englishDefinitions: The artworks, objects, or materials that a museum, gallery, or institution owns and keeps long-term.
A collection that is not temporary and is considered part of an institution's core holdings.
persianTranslation: آثار یا اشیای دائمی یک موزه یا گالری
examples: The museum's permanent collection includes paintings from the nineteenth century.
Only a small part of the permanent collection is on display at one time.
The sculpture was donated to the gallery's permanent collection.
